question_text:
Valid Anagram

Given two strings s and t, return true if t is an anagram of s, and false otherwise.
input_format: First line string s, second line string t.
constraints: s and t consist of lowercase English letters.
explanation: Given characters perfectly operate universally inside mapped charsets independently manipulating explicit occurrence arrays or Python Collections strictly tracks count mappings scaling cleanly bounding dynamically towards exact O(N) operations utilizing strictly limited O(1) constraints handling uniquely 26 distinct identifiers avoiding unneeded O(NlogN) sorting costs.
